variables.notes: Candidate list appears incomplete for direct cost-of-sales components. Added 'Bunker cost' from the Income Statement A-column because it is a clear direct operating/service cost and sits with other cost-of-sales components. variables.notes: Candidate list misses the relevant income statement overhead rows. No explicit SG&A subtotal is present. Selected 'Staff Expenses' as the best overhead component and also included 'Exploration and Development Costs' to align with the XSGA-XRD treatment when R&D is reported separately. Manual review needed because 'Staff Expenses' may include some direct labor in this industry. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Staff Expenses, [Income Statement] Exploration and Development Costs
